title: Take to the Skies
description: Take to the Skies reshapes crafting and progression for Tech to the Skies, removing 85 recipes and adding 100+. It enforces balanced automation and skyfaring growth, ensuring every craft fits the pack’s journey toward flight and advanced tech.
body:
If you want a server setup using Take to the Skies with zero effort, get a server with BisectHosting and receive 25% off your first month as a new customer using the code kreezxil

 

Take to the Skies – Core Progression Module

Take to the Skies is the core content mod built exclusively for the modpack Tech to the Skies. This mod reshapes Minecraft’s crafting ecosystem—streamlining early-game clutter, eliminating redundant recipes, and enforcing a deliberate, skyfaring progression. Every crafting decision feeds into a broader technological climb, where resources, automation, and flight must be earned step by step.

 

By rebalancing the recipe tree, Take to the Skies ensures that every achievement—from your first brass mechanism to your final airborne platform—feels earned, meaningful, and integrated into a cohesive journey.

 

This module is not a standalone experience. It is tightly bound to Tech to the Skies and designed for seamless integration within that pack’s balance and automation goals.

Key Adjustments

  • 85 vanilla and modded recipes voided:
        Removed redundant or progression-breaking crafts that allowed premature access to mid- and late-game components.
  • 101 new custom recipes added:
        Introduces tier-gated alternatives emphasizing Create-style mechanics, manual processing, and sky resource loops.
  • Automation pacing:
        Recipes have been realigned to make automation through Create, Immersive Engineering, and related tech mods a deliberate, incremental process.
  • Resource-driven discovery:
        Encourages exploration of alternate materials and processing chains—especially those that align with aerial survival and limited-ground resource play.
  • Integrated progression control:
        Balances all custom recipes with the Tech to the Skies unlock chain, ensuring that mod interdependencies never outpace the intended player tier.

In short:
Take to the Skies is the silent architect behind Tech to the Skies’ progression curve—redefining how players craft, build, and ascend. Every removed, replaced, or introduced recipe exists to reinforce the modpack’s central vision: turning the skies into your new frontier.
